name: jatropha podagrica
intensity: Mild therapeutic effects externally, severe toxicity if ingested.
contraindications: avoid with oral use contraindicated due to toxicity
safetyNotes: Toxic if ingested,severe vomiting,diarrhea,respiratory failure,High,contains curcin and phorbol esters.
description: Ornamental and medicinal plant with thick stem and red flowers.
dosage: Not safe for ingestion,used externally in traditional remedies.
duration: Topical effects within hours; no systemic duration due to toxicity.
legalStatus: Toxic plant; not approved for medical use
traditionalUse: Used externally for joint pain and inflammation in folk medicine.
